nasb.text: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David; and Ahaz his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David, and Ahaz his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約坦和他的列祖同睡，埋葬在大衛城裡；他的兒子亞哈斯接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约坦与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城。他儿子亚哈斯继位。
